item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n15","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the case as a normal optimization iteration with improving metrics, did not trigger triage or block the next step as a repair spiral, and gave a concrete experiment plan for moving reminder timing.
